creator: mcdougall@ameritech.net
text:
Upon boot, and every so many minutes after, I get messages on the 1st syscon as follows:
Sep  7 09:00:31 bsdx sendmail[25645]: NOQUEUE: SYSERR(root): hash map "Alias0": unsafe map file /etc/aliases: No such file or directory

I began getting this after I upgraded from 2.2.2-RELEASE to 3.0-current.  Also, I cannot use some/any local mail fucntions since sendmail is broken here.

Fix: 

??
How-To-Repeat: Boot, use mail or fetchmail
